plan.failureSummary: The test failed because a cached selector ('#\\:rl\\:-form-item' or 'Select your occupation') could not be found on the page. Visual evidence shows the form currently displays 'Age Group' radio buttons where the automation expected an occupation dropdown.
observedIndicators: Failure screenshot shows 'Age Group' instead of the expected 'Select your occupation' button
Dynamic ID pattern (:rX:) detected in failed selector metadata
High pass rate (71%) with sudden failure suggests UI change or unstable environment

remediationSteps.summary: Clear AI cache and retry test.
remediationSteps.details: Clear the page.ai cache and re-run the test. The autonomous agent will adapt to the current UI structure.

remediationSteps.summary: Review and harden selectors if instability continues.
remediationSteps.details: If the failure persists after cache clearing, update the automation to use more robust, text-based selectors that are less sensitive to layout shifts or unstable IDs.

plan.notes: The use of deterministic mode with unstable dynamic IDs (e.g., :rl:, :rj:) likely caused the failure when the form structure or ID generation sequence changed. Clearing the cache will allow the autonomous agent to re-map the page correctly.
